summary: Check rows.Err() after the rows.Next() loop in since.go, export.go, and the second loop in webhook_replay.go so an interrupted query surfaces an error instead of silently returning a truncated result set.
reason: Greptile P1 review finding on PR #676 (third pass): the same rows.Err() gap previously fixed in gravity/response_time recurred in these three commands. since returns a partial JSON list, export writes a truncated NDJSON file with nil return, webhook-replay silently drops deliveries beyond the interruption point.
